01 — Profile

About Me

I am a final-year B.A. Economics & Finance student at Mahindra University — consistently ranked Top 10 for three consecutive years and Valedictorian of my school. My work spans econometrics, corporate finance, actuarial science, agentic AI, and enterprise risk.

I founded VinAI Technologies and VinAI Eduverse, designed India's first AI-in-Marketing programme for 450+ MBA students, addressed 8,000+ people as keynote speaker at JITO International, and won the GOER 2025 National Championship (₹1 Lakh prize).

ACET Topper (Distinction, first attempt). SEBI Registered Equity Research Analyst. Nominated — India 30 Under 30. Featured in IIM EconShastra.
